appearance.themeDescription: Choose light, dark, or system appearance. Changes apply immediately and are saved locally.
appearance.languageDescription: Choose the interface and AI output language. Changes apply immediately.
appearance.languageError: Could not save the language preference. The previous language was restored.

system.title: Follow system
system.description: Match the operating system’s light or dark appearance.

provider.title: AI provider
provider.help: Commit generation, task generation, task implementation, and all other AI features use the selected CLI.
provider.codexDescription: Use the local codex command with your OpenAI / Codex account and quota.
provider.cursorDescription: Use the local agent command with your Cursor subscription.

prompts.goalHelp: When you select Generate tasks: template + goal.md + repository context → AI
prompts.goalReset: Restore the default Generate tasks template
prompts.taskHelp: Used by … → Implement; AI can modify files in the project directory
prompts.taskReset: Restore the default Implement task template
prompts.documentExecuteHelp: When you choose … → Execute on a document or folder: prompt + all document text → AI
prompts.documentExecuteReset: Restore the default Execute document prompt

summary.title: Automatic generation time
summary.description: At this time, GitTracker opens the activity center and generates today’s summary (same as manual). Enable it on the Summary page.
summary.hint: Generation runs at this time while the app remains open.
